title: AI Product Engineer, Go-to-Market
company_focus:
End User Computing solutions (Workspace ONE, Horizon) for
secure digital workspaces
description:
Job Description:

Job Role: AI Product Engineer, Go-to-Market

Who We Are

Omnissa is shaping the future of End User Computing. Our
innovative solutions, including Workspace ONE and Horizon,
empower organizations to deliver seamless, secure digital
workspaces. We’re proud to serve a broad base of numerous
Fortune 500 companies as well as leading government
institutions and agencies, helping them power secure,
scalable digital work environments.

As a recently independent company backed by KKR, we’re in
high-growth mode—scaling rapidly and building for the
future.  

About This Role 

We are seeking a trailblazing AI Product Engineer to join
our team in Bangalore, India, to pioneer a new paradigm of
product development within our Engineering team—a critical
component of Omnissa’s Go-to-Market strategy.

In this unique role, you will act as a technical leader
orchestrating a digital workforce. Partnering closely with
our Product Management team, you will take defined business
requirements and act as the "manager" of your own team of AI
developers and architects (using cutting-edge tools like
Salesforce Agentforce and Cursor.ai). You will direct your
AI agents to autonomously break down, design, write, and
deploy the code yourself.

In this hybrid role, you will work in-office 3 days a week,
collaborating to drive the success of our Go-to-Market
ecosystem. This is an exciting opportunity to shape a key
system that enhances our Go-to-Market motions while working
at the absolute forefront of AI-assisted enterprise
development.

What is the Opportunity?

As an AI Product Engineer for our Go-to-Market Engineering
team, you will play a pivotal role in executing the vision
for our Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, and Support
organizations. You will receive business logic and
requirements from Product Management and serve as the
technical subject matter expert who translates that vision
into reality.

Instead of managing a traditional engineering pod, you will
leverage an agentic AI framework to turn the product backlog
into robust, user-focused solutions at unprecedented speeds.
Bringing an engineering background and deep Salesforce.com
expertise, you will lead your AI agents through solution
design, code generation, and deployment.

You will also be responsible for:

- Requirement Deconstruction: Partnering with Product
  Management to ingest defined business requirements,
  breaking them down into actionable technical
  specifications, system architecture, and solution designs.

- Managing AI Agents (Agentic Development): Acting as the
  "engineering manager" for a suite of AI tools (like
  Cursor.ai and Salesforce Agentforce), delegating tasks to
  your digital team to rapidly generate, test, and deploy
  code.

- AI-Driven Solutions: Directing the design, development, and
  deployment of features on the Salesforce.com platform
  (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud) utilizing both traditional
  APEX/LWC and modern AI frameworks.

- Technical Ownership: Owning the execution of the product
  backlog, reviewing and refining the output of your AI
  agents to ensure code quality, security, and system
  efficiency.

- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Communicating effectively
  with Product Management, Go-to-Market, and Service teams
  to demonstrate AI-generated prototypes, iterate rapidly
  based on feedback, and ensure the technical solution
  aligns with business goals.

- System & AI Optimization: Monitoring and evaluating the
  performance of the Customer Success systems, including the
  efficacy, accuracy, and efficiency of your deployed AI
  agents and automated workflows.

What will you bring to Omnissa?

- 3-4 years of experience in a Salesforce Developer, Technical
  Product Owner, or Solution Architect role, with a strong
  track record of delivering internal applications for Back
  Office or Front Office IT systems.

- Experience developing and deploying Salesforce capabilities
  (APEX), with a strong desire to master—or existing
  experience in—Salesforce Agentforce.

- Hands-on experience or strong familiarity with AI-assisted
  coding tools (e.g., Cursor.ai, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex,
  etc) and a deep understanding of how to prompt and
  orchestrate LLMs to solve complex architectural logic.

- A strong engineering background paired with technical
  leadership sense; the ability to understand business
  requirements from PMs and articulate them into precise
  instructions for AI agents.

- Exceptional communication and collaboration skills to engage
  with Product Management and technical teams.

- A curious, proactive, and "hacker" mindset, with the ability
  to independently leverage AI multipliers to scale your
  output and deliver enterprise-grade Salesforce solutions.

- Ability to work in a hybrid role in Bangalore, India with 3
  days per week in-office.

Location: Bangalore, India

Education: Bachelor's Degree preferred, or equivalent
combination of education and relevant professional
experience.

Omnissa is an Equal Employment Opportunity company and
Prohibits Discrimination and Harassment of Any Kind:

Omnissa is committed to the principle of equal employment
opportunity for all employees and to providing employees
with a work environment free of discrimination and
harassment. All employment decisions at Omnissa are based on
business needs, job requirements and individual
qualifications, without regard to race, color, religion or
belief, national, social or ethnic origin, sex (including
pregnancy), age, physical, mental or sensory disability, HIV
Status, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or
expression, marital, civil union or domestic partnership
status, past or present military service, family medical
history or genetic information, family or parental status,
or any other status protected by the laws or regulations in
the locations where we operate. Omnissa will not tolerate
discrimination or harassment based on any of these
characteristics. Omnissa welcomes applicants of all ages.
Omnissa will provide reasonable accommodations to applicants
and employees who have protected disabilities consistent
with local law.    This job requisition is not eligible for
employment-based immigration sponsorship by Omnissa.
responsibilities: Partner with Product Management to deconstruct business requirements into technical specifications and solution designs
Manage and direct AI agents (Cursor.ai, Salesforce Agentforce) as digital workforce to generate, test, and deploy code
Design, develop, and deploy features on Salesforce platform using APEX, LWC, and AI frameworks
Own execution of product backlog, reviewing and refining AI-generated code for quality, security, and efficiency
Collaborate cross-functionally with Product Management and Go-to-Market teams to demonstrate prototypes and iterate on feedback
Monitor and evaluate performance of Customer Success systems including AI agents and automated workflows
use_cases: Go-to-Market automation for Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, and Support organizations
Salesforce platform development (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud) using AI-assisted code generation
Customer Success system automation and optimization
Internal application development for Back Office and Front Office IT systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly working with AI agents and LLMs
to build and deploy software solutions. The engineer manages
AI agents (Salesforce Agentforce, Cursor.ai) to autonomously
generate, test, and deploy code, requiring deep
understanding of how to prompt and orchestrate LLMs for
complex architectural logic.
